recommendations.title: Rampart
recommendations.overview: The story follows veteran police officer Dave Brown, the last of the renegade cops, as he struggles to take care of his family, and fights for his own survival.

recommendations.title: The Messenger
recommendations.overview: Will Montgomery, a U.S. Army Staff Sergeant who has returned home from Iraq, is assigned to the Army’s Casualty Notification service. Montgomery is partnered with Captain Tony Stone, to give notice to the families of fallen soldiers. The Sergeant is

recommendations.title: The Dinner
recommendations.overview: Two brothers and their wives meet up at a haute-cuisine restaurant to discuss what to do about a horrific crime that their sons committed together. As the quartet debate their options, the conversation reopens old wounds between the siblings.

recommendations.title: Two Is a Family
recommendations.overview: A man without attachments or responsibilities suddenly finds himself with an abandoned baby and leaves for London to try and find the mother. Eight years later after he and his daughter become inseparable Gloria's mother reappears.

recommendations.title: It's a Wonderful Life

recommendations.title: Blow

recommendations.title: Father of the Bride Part II

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect

recommendations.title: Interview
recommendations.overview: After falling out with his editor, a fading political journalist is forced to interview America's most popular soap actress.

recommendations.title: Natural Selection
recommendations.overview: Tyler is a young man who is desperately seeking direction from a world that seems to have abandoned him. Searching for answers he looks to his new friend Indrid who appears to have it all figured out.
